title: ThePackage
description: The package is a create-focused modpack for casual co-play and is intended to provide a vanilla-like experience, for extended gameplay and to make exploration more exciting I have added some mods that redesign both world generation and most structures
body:
a package created to easy upgrade a server that we want to us to play together

This is a create-focused modpack for casual co-play and is intended to provide a vanilla-like experience, for extended gameplay and to make exploration more exciting I have added some mods that redesign both world generation and most structures
